content_body: I recently stayed at the Cohutta Sunrise home and it did not disappoint. The home is very well laid out. All bedrooms are situated perfectly for privacy and you aren't on top of one another. It's extremely cozy with AMAZING views of the sunrise and also beautiful skies in the afternoon. Only about 20 minutes from downtown Blue Ridge if you want to shop...half of that time is getting off the mountain so it's actually super close. We would definitely stay here again.
title: Amazing Sunrise Views
